notes.hard_skills: Heaviest weight — skills are the #1 predictor of job performance in technical roles
notes.experience_level: Second heaviest — but 'slope over level' (Adam Grant) means trajectory matters more than raw years
notes.culture_indicators: Pure Technology pillar: Love. Culture fit is non-negotiable
notes.growth_trajectory: Lower weight but critical flag — short tenure patterns = flight risk
notes.education_fit: Lowest weight — many roles don't strictly require degrees. Skills > credentials
